spec_match.rationale: The compatibility lab provides eight thorough CSS.supports() probes testing different color syntaxes and property integrations of the image() function.

interactive.rationale: Excellent interactive toggling between image() mode and legacy fallbacks, dynamically updating previews and code.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The parent blurb aligns perfectly with the compatibility lab concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers named colors, hex, rgb, oklch, transparent, and progressive enhancement patterns with @supports.

references.rationale: The page now includes the mandatory ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Uses design system classes and variables, aligning with the visual guidelines.

summary: A highly thorough diagnostic tool and compatibility comparison page for image(<color>) with excellent interactive toggling, support probes, and the required ChromeStatus reference.
